data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the implementation or functionality of this requirement. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to version changes leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of re-sign requirement being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-sign requirement when form version changes.
